nasb.text: David persuaded his men with these words and did not allow them to rise up against Saul. And Saul arose, left the cave, and went on his way.

esv.text: So David persuaded his men with these words and did not permit them to attack Saul. And Saul rose up and left the cave and went on his way.

cnv.text: 大衛用這些話阻止了跟隨他的人，不讓他們起來攻擊掃羅。掃羅起來，出了山洞，繼續走他的路去了。

ccb.text: 大卫用这些话拦住他的部下，不让他们杀扫罗。 扫罗起来离开山洞走了，
